name: design-md
description: Agent guidance for creating, validating, and applying DESIGN.md visual identity specifications.

interface.shortDescription: Create and apply structured visual identity specs for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Use DESIGN.md to describe visual identity with YAML design tokens and Markdown rationale, validate specs with @google/design.md, and apply consistent design systems across generated interfaces.
defaultPrompt: Create a DESIGN.md for this product interface.
Review this DESIGN.md for token and prose issues.
Apply this DESIGN.md while building the UI.
